SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTLED. TRIAL DATE OFF CALENDAR. TERMS OF SETTLEMENT PLACED ON RECORD AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT TO VACATE ON OR BEFORE 9/6/06, 5PM. PLAINTIFF WILL FILE DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE BY 9/30/06 AND PAY TO DEFENDANT $1500.
IF DEFENDANT BREACHES AGREEEMENT, PLAINTIFF TO SUBMITT EXPARTE APPLICATION AND DECLARATION FOR IMMEDIATE JUDGMENT FOR RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF 513 MINNA STREET #4.
NO FURTHER STAYS; TIME IS OF THE ESSENCE; PARTIES RELEASE EACH OTHER OF ALL CLAIMS PER 1542.
PLAINTIFF TO RETAIN ANY PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT AND TO RETAIN SECURITY DEFPOSIT. DEFENDANT FORFEITS LEASE. DEFENDANT TO STAY AWAY FROM PROPERTY AFTER 9/6/06. THIS STIPULATION BINDING TO ALL HEIRS AND MAY BE SIGNED IN COUNTERPARTS. PLAINTIFF NOT TO HARASS DEFENDANT
